message:
fix(sync): respect dolt-native mode in JSONL export paths

Add ShouldExportJSONL() checks to three JSONL export paths that were
unconditionally writing JSONL even in dolt-native sync mode:

- create.go:flushRoutedRepo() - bd-a9ka
- autoflush.go:flushToJSONLWithState() - bd-ixip
- daemon_sync.go:exportToJSONLWithStore() - bd-u9yv

In dolt-native mode, JSONL files should not be written since Dolt
remotes are the sole synchronization mechanism. These three code
paths bypassed the sync mode check that exists in sync.go.

Fixes bd-a9ka, bd-ixip, bd-u9yv.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
